blended.narrative: Lakeridge is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 970 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
